overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through Night City's Japantown district. The character travels under elevated highways, past neon billboards and political posters, through a traditional red torii-style gate, and into an open industrial intersection. The scene features a mix of futuristic cyberpunk architecture and traditional Asian elements with bright morning lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: emerging from shadow under the highway into bright morning sunlight
exiting the covered highway structure into open street

agents.ego_description: jogging forward under the elevated highway toward the daylight

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overhead highway with support pillars
suspended advertisement sign with yellow text reading TOUGH MEATBALLS
low concrete wall separating pedestrian path from street
large political campaign poster with VOTE PERALEZ text and portrait

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dimly lit corridor beneath an elevated highway, emerging into bright morning light. Concrete barriers line the left side while massive support pillars hold up the overhead structure. A political campaign poster and suspended billboard become visible as the character approaches the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with mixed residential buildings

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: running along the street passing other pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the character's path

entered.detail: multi-story residential tower with balconies and external wiring
red traditional-style lanterns hanging over the street

segments.scene_description: Running along an open commercial street bathed in morning sunlight, the character passes a large VOTE PERALEZ political poster on the left. The street features a mix of residential towers and commercial buildings, with red traditional lanterns hanging overhead. A black sedan drives parallel on the right while pedestrians walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with industrial green building

events.description: slight right turn to follow the curved street alignment

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the curved street passing pedestrians in casual clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead on the green bike path

entered.detail: weathered green concrete industrial building with external air conditioning units
large external HVAC units mounted on the building facade
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrower street section dominated by a distinctive green industrial building on the left with visible air conditioning units. The street curves gently to the right, passing under an elevated walkway bridge. Other pedestrians walk ahead on the green-painted bike lane while parked vehicles line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching traditional Asian gate landmark

events.description: approaching the large red traditional gate structure marking district boundary
passing through the archway of the traditional red gate

agents.ego_description: running toward and passing through the large red traditional gate structure

entered.detail: large red torii-style traditional gate with curved roof marking the district entrance
large vertical digital screen displaying pink and purple neon advertisement
tall cylindrical industrial structure with smokestacks visible behind the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent red traditional gate that marks a district boundary, with a tall industrial tower visible beyond it. Large digital billboards display neon advertisements on the left. The character runs through the gate's archway, transitioning from the narrow street into a more open area with industrial buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial intersection with warehouse buildings

events.description: crossing the open intersection as vehicles pass through the area

agents.ego_description: crossing the open street in an industrial area while vehicles drive through the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with satellite dishes and smokestacks on roof
tall palm tree growing near the sidewalk in the industrial zone
suspended traffic signal showing green light over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the red gate, the character enters a wide-open industrial intersection with warehouse buildings and palm trees. The character crosses the street as a yellow sports car drives through the intersection. Industrial smokestacks rise in the background while overhead highway ramps are visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed underpass into the bright, bustling commercial streets of a futuristic district. It begins in a dimly lit corridor beneath an elevated highway, moving past massive concrete support pillars before emerging into the vivid morning light of an open street. As the character accelerates, the scene opens up into a sun-drenched thoroughfare lined with residential towers, where the camera passes a large political poster and red traditional lanterns hanging overhead. The environment then shifts toward a narrower urban corridor dominated by a green industrial building with external air conditioning units, curving gently to the right. Finally, the camera glides under an elevated walkway bridge, following a green-painted bike lane past parked vehicles and pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit street through a traditional gateway into a wide industrial intersection. It begins as the character approaches a prominent red torii-style gate, passing beneath large digital billboards and neon advertisements while a tall industrial tower looms in the distance. As the character runs through the gate's archway, the confined street opens up, transitioning the view toward a sprawling urban landscape of warehouses and industrial buildings. The scene then expands into a broad intersection where the character crosses the street past palm trees and a passing yellow sports car. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the horizon, revealing towering smokestacks and elevated highway ramps under the bright morning light.
